name: Atlantic Blue Dragon
description: The strongest ocean entity controlling water and wind together

name: Sea Guardian
description: A coastal guardian that protects shores from deep-sea threats

name: fri n lbaḥr
description: A small cave-dwelling sea creature that hides inside rocks

name: Sea Rock Beast
description: A living sea rock that only moves when attacking

name: Sea Predator
description: A fast deep-sea hunter that attacks in packs

name: Sea Groom Spirit
description: A mythical spirit appearing during storms

name: Current Serpent
description: A long sea creature living in strong ocean currents, using speed and ambush to hunt small fish

name: Akal n waman
description: A creature that slightly reshapes the seabed

name: Coral Reef Guard
description: A small-to-medium sea creature living in coral reefs that protects its territory from predators. Non-mythical, just an evolved marine species

name: Spear Fish
description: A fast surface fish that attacks with high-speed charges

name: Shield Crab
description: A small crab with a strong shell living among sea rocks

name: Amghar n lbaḥr
description: An ancient sea elder maintaining ocean balance

name: Storm Spirit
description: A spirit born from lightning and waves

name: Azul n lghraq
description: A dark entity that appears during drowning moments

name: Water Warrior
description: A fighter who uses water as a weapon

name: Tide Guardian
description: A creature controlling tides

name: Agraw n waman
description: A stronger version controlling larger currents

name: Black Sea King
description: Ruler of the dark and dangerous depths

name: Agour Amarg
description: A legendary wolf-like sea predator

name: Azmao n yillel
description: An ancient spirit tied to an endless ocean

name: Ocean Beast
description: A giant creature from the deep ocean

name: Agulid lbiḥar
description: A mid-tier king controlling sea creatures

name: Black Sea Mist Entity
description: A mist-based entity that appears in sea fog and disrupts enemy vision before striking

name: Bubble Shell
description: A small sea creature that creates a bubble layer around itself or an ally to reduce incoming damage.
